summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of Outlook-style Member Inbox at /notifications. All core features verified working: ticket sections (Waiting on You, Active), desktop split view with 380px left list, mobile full-screen navigation, collapsible sections, search functionality, warm cream background (#F5F2EC), pillar badges, reply input with send button, and pink ring highlight on selected ticket.

issues: MINOR: 'Resolved' section not visible when empty (expected behavior per requirements - collapsed by default)
MINOR: Mobile thread view uses dark theme while desktop split view uses light theme - intentional design choice but creates visual inconsistency

critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: Warm cream background (#F5F2EC) correctly applied to inbox container and ticket list
VERIFIED: No purple gradients found in the inbox page
VERIFIED: Desktop split view working - 380px left list with TicketThread in right panel
VERIFIED: Mobile responsive - full-width list, tap navigates to /tickets/:id full screen
VERIFIED: Ticket grouping logic in classifyTicket() correctly identifies 'waiting' (concierge/admin replied) vs 'active' (member-initiated)
VERIFIED: Collapsible sections with ChevronDown/ChevronRight icons
VERIFIED: Search filters by title, pet name, pillar, ticket_id, description
VERIFIED: Left border colors: amber (#F59E0B) for 'Waiting on You', green (#40916C) for 'Active', red (#EF4444) for urgent, gray (#CBD5E1) for resolved
VERIFIED: Pink ring highlight (#C96D9E) on selected ticket
VERIFIED: Reply input with send button at bottom of thread panel
VERIFIED: Message preview shows actual conversation text (not Mira briefing) via getLastMessage() filtering out mira/system messages
VERIFIED: Pillar badges (Play, Health, Docs, Food, Celebrate, General) with correct colors

test_results.waiting_on_you_section: PASS - Shows 1 ticket (TDB-2026-0571) with amber border
test_results.active_section: PASS - Shows 14 tickets with green/red borders
test_results.resolved_section: PASS - Empty (collapsed by default per requirements)
test_results.desktop_split_view: PASS - 380px left list + right TicketThread panel
test_results.mobile_full_width: PASS - Full-width list, no split view on mobile
test_results.collapsible_sections: PASS - Click section header toggles visibility
test_results.no_purple_gradients: PASS - No purple gradient elements found
test_results.selected_ticket_highlight: PASS - Pink ring (#C96D9E) on selected ticket
test_results.reply_input: PASS - Textarea with placeholder 'Type a message...'
test_results.send_button: PASS - Send button with paper plane icon
test_results.ticket_card_elements: PASS - Title, pillar badge, pet name, time ago, message count, preview snippet
test_results.message_preview_snippet: PASS - TDB-2026-0571 shows 'You are welcome' (concierge reply)
test_results.left_border_colors: PASS - Amber for waiting, green for active, red for urgent

seed_data_creation: None - used existing tickets for user dipali@clubconcierge.in
context_for_next_testing_agent: Outlook-style inbox at /notifications fully verified. Key flows: (1) Login dipali@clubconcierge.in/test123 → /notifications shows 15 tickets (1 waiting, 14 active). (2) Desktop: click ticket → split view with TicketThread in right panel. (3) Mobile: tap ticket → full-screen /tickets/:id. (4) Search filters by pet/pillar/title. (5) Sections collapsible. (6) TDB-2026-0571 in 'Waiting on You' with snippet 'You are welcome'. (7) Reply input + send button at bottom of thread. (8) Warm cream background #F5F2EC, no purple gradients.
